identity_payload.label: eq:macro-end
identity_payload.source_math:
q(x) &= \Macro{x} % cafe-accent: café, escaped row separator follows: \\
\nonumber\\
&\quad + \sum_{j=1}^{n} z_j
\label{eq:macro-end}

ambiguities.required_discriminator: retain exactly one explicit owning label or split the mathematical row into separately labeled rows
retain exactly one explicit owning label or split the mathematical row into separately labeled rows
supply one adjacent number-suppressed relation head in the same environment stack

identity_payload.label: eq:incremental-cash-flow
identity_payload.source_math:
\Delta CF_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
  &=
  \Delta PPNR_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
  - \Delta EL_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
  - \Delta Kchg_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
  \nonumber\\
  &\quad
  - \Delta Tax_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
  + \Delta RelValue_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s),
  \label{eq:incremental-cash-flow}

normalized_target.display_text: \Delta CF_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s) = \Delta PPNR_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s) - \Delta EL_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s) - \Delta Kchg_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s) - \Delta Tax_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s) + \Delta RelValue_{i,t+h}(a,\pi;s)
